MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2002 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: Settlement conference assigned to Department 303, Judge: Douglas C. Munson; Clerk: David Swanson; Reporter: JUNE LEATHLEY, CSR #1629. Michael S. Rossoff, Esq. appeared on behalf of Plaintiff and there was not appearance by Defendant. The court granted Plaintiff's motion to strike jury demand and ordered the settlement conference off calendar.
